subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet sent down by the Lord of mercy that the people of the world may be enabled to draw nigh unto this Ocean
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لیقرب به من فی الامکان الی البحر الذی تموج باسمه العظیم من
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
